# Atlassian Rovo

Atlassian's AI assistant product built on top of the Atlassian suite (Jira, Confluence). Surfaced in the June 2026 ODT competitive analysis as an example of anti-RAG structural architecture. Not evaluated further — Janus does not use Atlassian products as primary systems of record.
